query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'reward_views';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'reward_views';
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE	COLUMN_TYPE
id	int	int(11)
teamMemberId	int	int(11)
callId	int	int(11)
rewardsProcessed	enum	enum('true','false')
xpEarned	int	int(11)
badgesEarned	json	json
viewedAt	timestamp	timestamp
